templates.name: SolaX EMS1000 (ModbusTCP)
templates.notes: Power values are normalized to kW (2 decimals) and energy to kWh (2 decimals). For PV power limit / battery power target writes the adapter pre-writes system control=remote, control mode=8 and TargetSetType=update.

datapoints.name: VPP mode number (write 4 for battery power target mode)
Battery power target (VPP Mode 4) (+ discharge / - charge)

templates.name: go-e Charger Gemini (HTTP API v2 legacy filter)
KEBA KeContact P40 (Modbus)
templates.description: KEBA KeContact P40 via Modbus TCP/RTU (holding registers).
KEBA KeContact P20/P30 via UDP (Report 2/3 + curr/ena).

templates.name: SolaX X1/X3-HAC EV-Charger G2 (Modbus)
templates.notes: Based on SolaX X1/X3-HAC EV charger Modbus RTU/TCP protocol v1.0.0 (2024-06-25). Input registers (FC=04) and holding registers (FC=03/06). Power values are exposed in kW (scaled from W), energies in kWh. 32-bit values are read with little-endian word order. Device docs recommend a minimum interval of 1s between Modbus commands.

templates.name: Shelly Shelly Plug S Gen3 (Gen3 RPC)
Janitza UMG 604/604-PRO
templates.notes: Werte werden im Adapter auf kW/kWh skaliert und auf 2 Nachkommastellen gerundet.

templates.notes: Werte werden im Adapter auf kW/kWh skaliert und auf 2 Nachkommastellen gerundet.

templates.name: Janitza UMG 96-PA
templates.notes: Häufig benötigte Messwerte (Float). Leistungen/Energien werden auf kW/kWh skaliert und auf 2 Nachkommastellen gerundet.

templates.name: Solar-Log PM V2 (Power Management Modbus TCP)
SolaX X3-MEGA G2/X3-FORTH (Modbus RTU) - Minimal
templates.notes: Registers from SolaX Power three phase inverter X3-MEGA G2/X3-FORTH Modbus-RTU protocol v1.1 (2023-05-16). Addresses in this template are decimal equivalents of the hex addresses in the PDF. Active power is exposed in kW (scaled from W), energies in kWh.
